title: GOT GOT GOT
description: Replaces the potion drinking sound with an intense "GOT GOT GOT"
body:
![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1388641212977909881?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=%23ffffff&label=EliteCord&labelColor=FF399F&color=FF8132&link=https%3A%2F%2Felte.uk%2Fdiscord)

# What does this resource pack do?

This pack simply replaces the drinking sound with a **_very intense_** "**GOT GOT GOT**".

# This is not weird and just changes the drinking sound.

**_Some people_ (looking at you)**, may hear the sound "**GOT GOT GOT"** with a _filthy mind_ |:', but I just mean the sound that happens when you drink too fast.

If you are unaware what I mean by "Drinking sound", **there is an image below to clarify** - ↓

![Screenshot from using this texture pack on Astro Client](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4118d061b9a7b6e99cea3bdcf80a246d818abc42.png)

Screenshot taken on [Butterium (click to download on Modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/astro)

# Credits

We (**_ELTE Studios_**), **developed** and **made** this pack using the **Butterium** modpack for the **best optimisation, smoothness and QOL**, you can **download it on modrinth [here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/butterium)**.
